actions: system_button: Press the home button to return to the home screen.
swipe: Swipe up to access the app drawer and search for the clock or alarm app.
swipe: Swipe up to access the app drawer and find the clock or alarm app.
tap: Access the app drawer by swiping up from the bottom of the screen to find the clock or alarm app.
swipe: Swipe up to open the app drawer and scroll down to find the clock or alarm app.
tap: Click on the Clock app icon to open the app and set the alarm.
tap: Click on the Alarm tab at the top left to switch to the alarm settings.
tap: Click the '+' button at the bottom to add a new alarm for 11 AM.
tap: Click the '+' button to add a new alarm.
tap: Click on the number 11 on the clock interface to set the hour to 11.
tap: Click on the area where 00 is located to set the minutes to 00.
tap: Click 'OK' to confirm and save the alarm set for 11:00 AM.
tap: Click on 'PM' to switch it to 'AM' for the 11:00 AM alarm.
tap: Click on the 'PM' button to switch it to 'AM'.
tap: Click on the 'OK' button to confirm the alarm set for 11:00 AM.
system_button: Press the home button to navigate to the home screen.
swipe: Swipe up or down to navigate and search for the Clock app on the screen.
swipe: Swipe up or down on the screen to reveal more apps and look for the Clock app.
tap: Tap on the Clock app to open it.
tap: Click on the 'Alarm' tab to switch views and prepare to set an alarm for 1 PM.
tap: Click on the blue plus button at the bottom to create a new alarm.
tap: Click on the '1' to change the hour to 1 PM.
tap: Tap on the '00' to select it for setting the alarm to 1:00 PM.
tap: Tap 'OK' to confirm the alarm set for 1:00 PM.
tap: Tap the clock app icon to open it.
tap: Tap on the 4:00 PM alarm to open its settings for modification.
tap: Tap on the 2 on the clock face to set the hour to 2 PM.
tap: Tap the OK button to confirm setting the alarm for 2:00 PM.
tap: Click on the Save or Confirm button to finalize the alarm settings.
swipe: Swipe up to access the app drawer and look for the clock app.
tap: Tap on the Clock app to open it.
tap: Tap on the "Alarm" tab at the top left to switch to it.
tap: Tap on the 'Alarm' tab to switch to it.
tap: Click on the 'Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri' label to proceed with setting a weekday alarm.
tap: Click on the '+' button at the bottom to create a new alarm for 7:00 PM.
tap: Click on the number 7 on the clock face to set the hour to 7.
tap: Click on the '00' on the clock face to set the minutes to 00.
tap: Click the 'OK' button to set the alarm for 7:00 PM.
tap: Click the 'OK' button to confirm setting the alarm for 7:00 PM.
swipe: Swipe up or down to open the app drawer and search for the Clock app.
tap: Tap the Clock app to open it.
tap: Tap the downward arrow next to the 9:00 AM alarm to view more options or settings.

limitation: Text/action-only semantic baseline: screenshot pixels are not embedded, and quality is measured on a small human-reviewed label set.
